exercise_requirement: Demonstrate failures from missing scaling, bad learning rates, excessive regularization, activation choice, misaligned labels, and vanishing gradients where feasible.
research_question: Can common training failures be reproduced safely and detected through objective diagnostics?
hypothesis: Each controlled fault will leave a distinct signature in loss, gradients, weights, timing, or alignment checks.
safety_notes: Run only in isolated diagnostic configurations.
Never train on validation data and never access the locked test split.
Misaligned labels are generated in memory from train-only copies and are not committed.
